rejects.reason: Manufacturer page (https://theordinary.com/en-us/natural-moisturizing-factors-ha-moisturizer-100435.html, title 'Natural Moisturizing Factors + HA Moisturizer | The Ordinary') classifies the product as a moisturizer (breadcrumb 'Moisturizers', 'Step 3: Seal', FAQ says to apply after serums and treatments); catalog target role is serum and the page states no serum use, so routine_role_not_verified cannot be cleared. Page usage is also only 'Apply as needed' (no fixed frequency stated in How to Use).
